suggestions.desc: Remove unused import declaration.

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

source:
// We need to support receiving search params like ?type=villa import { Navbar } from "@/components/Navbar"; import { CreditCard, Wallet, Lock, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; import Image from "next/image"; import Link from "next/link"; import fs from "fs/promises"; import path from "path"; import { formatCurrency } from "@/lib/utils"; async function getBookingItem(slug: string, type: string) { try { const fileName = type === "hotel-cabin" ? "cabins.json" : `${type}s.json`; const fallbackFileName = type === "wisata" ? "wisata.json" : fileName; const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), "data", fallbackFileName); const jsonData = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8"); const items = JSON.parse(jsonData); return items.find((item: any) => item.slug === slug); } catch (err) { return null; } } export default async function BookingPage({ params, searchParams }: { params: Promise<{ slug: string }>, searchParams: Promise<{ type?: string }> }) { const { slug } = await params; const { type = "villa" } = await searchParams; const item = await getBookingItem(slug, type); return (

Selesaikan Pemesanan Anda

{/* Kolom Kiri: Form */}
{/* Form Data Tamu */}

1 Data Pemesan

+62
{/* Metode Pembayaran */}

2 Metode Pembayaran

Pembayaran Anda aman dan dienkripsi ujung ke ujung.
{/* Kolom Kanan: Ringkasan Pesanan */}

Ringkasan Pesanan

{item ? ( <>
{type}

{item.nama}

Harga per malam/paket {formatCurrency(item.harga)}
Pajak aplikasi (11%) {formatCurrency(item.harga * 0.11)}
Total Pembayaran {item.harga === 0 ? "Gratis" : formatCurrency(item.harga + (item.harga * 0.11))}
) : (
Item tidak ditemukan.
)}

Dengan menyelesaikan pembayaran, Anda menyetujui Syarat dan Ketentuan Dienggo.

); }
